questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a fully managed, petabyte-scale data warehouse that allows you to run complex analytical queries on large datasets, and integrates with AWS Glue for ETL workflows?
A company needs to ensure that its Amazon S3 bucket is protected from accidental deletion even if the root user credentials are compromised. Which feature should be enabled?
possible_answers: S3 Object Lock in governance mode

questions.question_text: Which AWS service can be used to create a private, logical section of the AWS cloud where you can launch AWS resources in a virtual network that you define, and also allows you to use a NAT gateway to enable outbound internet access for instances in private subnets?
Under the AWS Shared Responsibility Model, which of the following is the customer's responsibility for an Amazon RDS database instance? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Managing database user accounts and permissions
Physical security of the data center housing the RDS instance
Encrypting data at rest using AWS KMS customer-managed keys
Patching the database engine minor version
correct_answers: Managing database user accounts and permissions
Encrypting data at rest using AWS KMS customer-managed keys

questions.question_text: Which AWS support plan provides 24/7 access to AWS Support API, full set of AWS Trusted Advisor checks, and a response time of 30 minutes for production system impairment?

A company wants to migrate 500 TB of data from its on-premises data center to Amazon S3. The company has limited bandwidth and needs to complete the migration within 2 weeks. Which AWS service should they use?
Which of the following are benefits of using AWS Organizations with consolidated billing? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Automatic encryption of all data across member accounts
One bill for multiple AWS accounts
Centralized management of IAM users across accounts
Shared volume pricing discounts across all accounts
Automatic backup of all EC2 instances
correct_answers: One bill for multiple AWS accounts
Shared volume pricing discounts across all accounts

questions.question_text: Which AWS service allows you to run code in response to events without provisioning or managing servers, and automatically scales from a few requests per day to thousands per second?
A customer wants to monitor the CPU utilization of their Amazon EC2 instances and receive an alert when utilization exceeds 80% for 10 consecutive minutes. Which AWS service should they use?
Which AWS service is used to distribute content to end users with low latency by caching it at edge locations, and also supports dynamic content acceleration and custom SSL certificates?
Under the AWS Shared Responsibility Model, which of the following is AWS responsible for?
possible_answers: Patching the guest operating system of EC2 instances
Configuring security groups and network ACLs
Physical security of AWS data centers
Encrypting data in transit between EC2 instances
correct_answers: Physical security of AWS data centers

questions.question_text: Which AWS service helps you audit and track changes to your AWS resources over time, and allows you to evaluate whether your resources comply with desired policies?
A company wants to host a static website at the lowest possible cost while ensuring high durability. Which AWS service is best suited for this?
possible_answers: Amazon S3 with static website hosting
correct_answers: Amazon S3 with static website hosting

questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a managed message queue service that decouples and scales microservices, distributed systems, and serverless applications?
Which of the following are valid AWS cost optimization best practices? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Always choose On-Demand instances for all workloads
Use Savings Plans for steady-state workloads
Deploy resources in multiple Regions to reduce costs
Use S3 Lifecycle policies to transition infrequently accessed data to colder storage tiers
Disable CloudTrail to reduce logging costs
correct_answers: Use Savings Plans for steady-state workloads
Use S3 Lifecycle policies to transition infrequently accessed data to colder storage tiers

questions.question_text: What is the minimum number of Availability Zones required to achieve high availability for an application running on Amazon EC2?
Which AWS service allows you to create a custom domain name for your application and route end users to internet applications by translating domain names to IP addresses?
A company wants to provide temporary, limited-privilege credentials to an application running on an EC2 instance to access an S3 bucket. What is the most secure way to achieve this?
possible_answers: Store IAM user access keys directly in the application code
Create an IAM role and attach it to the EC2 instance
Use root user credentials from environment variables
Embed long-term credentials in a configuration file
correct_answers: Create an IAM role and attach it to the EC2 instance

questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a fully managed NoSQL database that delivers single-digit millisecond performance at any scale, and supports both document and key-value data models?
Which AWS support plan includes a Technical Account Manager (TAM) and provides a 15-minute response time for business-critical system down issues?
Which of the following are pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework? (Select TWO.)

A company needs to run a batch processing job that can be interrupted at any time without affecting business operations. They want to minimize costs. Which Amazon EC2 instance purchasing option should they choose?
Which AWS service allows you to create and manage encryption keys for data at rest, and integrates with many other AWS services for server-side encryption?
Which of the following is a benefit of using AWS CloudFormation? (Select TWO.)
Which AWS service provides a highly available and scalable DNS service that can route end users to infrastructure in AWS or on-premises using health checks?
A customer wants to run a Microsoft SQL Server database on AWS and needs full administrative control over the operating system and database software. Which service should they choose?
possible_answers: Amazon EC2 with SQL Server installed
correct_answers: Amazon EC2 with SQL Server installed

questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a web-based interface to view and manage AWS bills, monitor usage, and analyze costs through built-in dashboards?
Which of the following are characteristics of Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Designed for data accessed once per year or less
Data cannot be deleted for 180 days
correct_answers: Designed for data accessed once per year or less

questions.question_text: Which AWS service enables you to run containerized applications on a cluster of EC2 instances without having to manage the underlying orchestration control plane?
A company wants to set up a dedicated, private network connection from its on-premises data center to AWS to reduce latency and increase security. Which service should it use?
Which AWS service provides real-time user engagement analytics and multichannel messaging (email, SMS, push) to drive user actions?
According to the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (CAF), which perspective focuses on developing and executing a cloud strategy aligned with business goals and outcomes?
Which of the following is a customer responsibility when using AWS Lambda?
Which AWS service allows you to run a graph database that supports highly connected datasets for applications like social networking and recommendation engines?
What is the primary purpose of an AWS Internet Gateway (IGW)?
possible_answers: To allow instances in a private subnet to access the internet
To provide a VPN connection to on-premises networks
To allow instances in a public subnet to communicate with the internet
correct_answers: To allow instances in a public subnet to communicate with the internet

questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a managed service for real-time streaming data that can capture, process, and analyze data from thousands of sources?
A company wants to automate the process of taking snapshots of EBS volumes every day and deleting snapshots older than 30 days. Which service can accomplish this without custom scripts?
Which of the following are true about AWS Regions? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Each Region consists of multiple isolated Availability Zones
Data transfer between Regions is free
All AWS services are available in every Region
Regions are geographically separated to provide fault tolerance and stability
You cannot replicate data across Regions
correct_answers: Each Region consists of multiple isolated Availability Zones
Regions are geographically separated to provide fault tolerance and stability

questions.question_text: Which AWS service helps protect web applications from common web exploits such as SQL injection and cross-site scripting (XSS) by allowing you to define customizable security rules?
Which AWS service provides a fully managed, highly scalable, and cost-effective object storage service that offers 99.999999999% (11 nines) of durability?
A customer wants to receive an alert when their monthly AWS charges exceed $1,000. Which AWS tool should they use?
Which of the following is a key principle of the AWS Well-Architected Framework's Operational Excellence pillar?
possible_answers: Design systems that can withstand failures
Select the right resource types for workload

questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a managed NoSQL database that is compatible with Apache Cassandra and offers linear scalability and high availability?
What is the main benefit of using AWS Savings Plans over On-Demand instances?
possible_answers: Significant discount in exchange for a commitment to a consistent amount of compute usage
correct_answers: Significant discount in exchange for a commitment to a consistent amount of compute usage

questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a managed, highly available, and secure service for storing and managing secrets such as database credentials and API keys?
Which of the following actions can help reduce data transfer costs in AWS? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Transferring data from S3 to EC2 in the same Region
Using CloudFront to cache content and reduce origin fetch
Using S3 Transfer Acceleration for small objects
correct_answers: Transferring data from S3 to EC2 in the same Region
Using CloudFront to cache content and reduce origin fetch

questions.question_text: Which AWS service allows you to run serverless containerized applications without provisioning or managing servers, and you only pay for the resources consumed?
possible_answers: Amazon EKS with managed node groups

questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a managed, scalable file storage for use with multiple Linux EC2 instances, supporting the Network File System (NFS) protocol?
possible_answers: Amazon FSx for Windows File Server

questions.question_text: What is the purpose of an AWS NAT Gateway?
possible_answers: To allow instances in a public subnet to access the internet
To allow instances in a private subnet to access the internet while preventing inbound connections from the internet
To distribute incoming traffic across multiple targets
correct_answers: To allow instances in a private subnet to access the internet while preventing inbound connections from the internet

questions.question_text: Which of the following are use cases for Amazon S3 Intelligent-Tiering? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Long-term archival with retrieval in hours
Data with unknown or changing access patterns
Frequently accessed data with predictable access
Automatic cost savings by moving data between access tiers without performance impact
Data that must be deleted immediately after upload
correct_answers: Data with unknown or changing access patterns
Automatic cost savings by moving data between access tiers without performance impact

questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a fully managed service for extracting and analyzing data from unstructured text, including sentiment analysis, entity recognition, and language detection?
A company wants to ensure that its EC2 instances are only launched with specific AMIs and instance types to comply with security policies. Which AWS service can enforce these controls?
possible_answers: Service Control Policies (SCPs) in AWS Organizations
correct_answers: Service Control Policies (SCPs) in AWS Organizations

questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a fully managed, scalable, and secure service for building conversational interfaces into applications using voice and text?
What is the primary benefit of using an AWS Application Load Balancer (ALB) over a Network Load Balancer (NLB)?
possible_answers: Support for TCP and UDP traffic
Static IP addresses per Availability Zone
Advanced request routing based on HTTP headers and paths
Ultra-low latency and millions of requests per second
correct_answers: Advanced request routing based on HTTP headers and paths

questions.question_text: Which AWS service allows you to track API calls made in your AWS account, including the identity of the caller, the time of the call, and the source IP address?
A company wants to analyze its AWS cost and usage data using Amazon Athena and Amazon QuickSight. Which AWS report provides the most granular data for this purpose?
Which of the following are true about AWS Shield Standard? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Provides protection against all known infrastructure layer DDoS attacks
Is a paid service that requires a monthly fee
Automatically enabled for all AWS customers at no additional cost
Provides 24/7 access to the DDoS response team
Protects against application layer attacks like HTTP floods
correct_answers: Provides protection against all known infrastructure layer DDoS attacks
Automatically enabled for all AWS customers at no additional cost

questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a fully managed, highly reliable, and scalable service for sending notifications to subscribers via email, SMS, or HTTP endpoints?

possible_answers: To provide a single sign-on experience for users
To centrally manage multiple AWS accounts and apply policies
To create and manage IAM users and groups
To automatically backup all AWS resources
correct_answers: To centrally manage multiple AWS accounts and apply policies

questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a fully managed, scalable, and secure service for running Apache Kafka clusters without the need to manage the underlying infrastructure?
possible_answers: Amazon MSK (Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka)

questions.question_text: Which of the following are true about AWS Free Tier? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Always available for all AWS services
Includes 12 months of free usage for certain services for new customers
Always free services like AWS Lambda include 1 million requests per month
Free tier usage counts across all Regions combined
Requires a credit card to be on file
correct_answers: Includes 12 months of free usage for certain services for new customers
Always free services like AWS Lambda include 1 million requests per month

questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a fully managed, highly available, and secure service for storing and retrieving emails, and can be used for both incoming and outgoing email?

Which of the following are true about AWS Trusted Advisor? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Provides recommendations in five categories: cost optimization, performance, security, fault tolerance, and service limits
Only available to customers with Enterprise support plan
Basic support plan includes access to 7 core checks
All checks are available to all support plans

questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a fully managed, highly available, and scalable service for processing and transforming streaming data in real-time using SQL or Java?

possible_answers: To control inbound and outbound traffic at the subnet level

To encrypt data in transit between VPCs
correct_answers: To act as a virtual firewall for EC2 instances

Paying only for the resources your application consumes

possible_answers: To cache content at edge locations to reduce latency

correct_answers: Amazon Managed Workflows for Apache Airflow (MWAA)

possible_answers: Management events track API calls that modify resources

Which of the following are characteristics of Amazon EBS snapshots? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Incremental backups that only save changed blocks
Stored in Amazon S3 for high durability

possible_answers: General Purpose SSD (gp3) is suitable for most workloads
